description_long: This is a sleek, modern knife with a sharply pointed, straight blade and a minimalist handle. The blade is long and tapers to a fine tip, ideal for precision tasks. The handle features three distinct finger grooves and a large circular cutout, likely for improved grip and control. The entire object appears to be constructed from a single piece of dark, metallic material, giving it a streamlined and tactical appearance. There are no visible decorative elements or additional attachments, emphasizing functionality and ergonomics. The surface is smooth and reflective, suggesting a polished metal finish.
description: A sleek, pointed knife with a straight blade and ergonomic handle featuring finger grooves and a circular cutout, all in a dark metallic finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight, pointed blade and the ergonomic handle with finger grooves and a circular cutout.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the open, skeletal structure of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blade and handle features, with the finger grooves and circular cutout visible.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, emphasizing the blade's sharpness and the handle's open design.
attribute_handle_design: contoured with three finger grooves and a large circular cutout, metallic, ergonomic
